objective: Implement Auto-Sync Status Handoff and Debug Logging Fixes
tests_added: src/surfaces/autoSyncStatusSurface.test.ts: minimum dwell, coalescing, cancellation via error, hide/dispose tests
src/controllers/syncthingMonitorMachine.test.ts: post-game completion via mutation, pending_activity_timeout updates
tests/test_service.py: debug_logging updates in persist tests
design_decisions: Workstream A: Added HAS_BACKUP_MIN_DWELL_MS (900ms). Used surface-local state inside createAutoSyncStatusSurface to defer Syncthing statuses and coalesce updates if they arrive during the minimum dwell of 'has_backup'. Preserved existing syncAutoSyncStatusBrowserViewDeferred behavior.

Workstream B: Added mutationObserved boolean to WatchMachineState. During post_game phase, scanning/activity statuses trigger mutationObserved. Settling logic now arms completion from mutationObserved. Updated pending_activity_timeout backstop to work for all non-uploaded states, enforcing a reliable 30-second completion even for tiny saves.

Workstream C: Added a backend setting '_debug_logging', registered 'set_debug_logging' RPC method, and updated logger fallback map to emit real logging.DEBUG level events when configured. Plumbed this through to the frontend via settingsMutationRuntime and exposed a ToggleField under the AutoSyncSettingsSection in the GLOBAL panel. Updated README.
results: All three workstreams are fully implemented. Unit tests run locally pass without errors. Typechecks successfully pass. Code successfully committed and round marked as complete.
